text:
いいところに来たわね！
ちょっと、頼みたいことがあるのよ。

お守り作りを再開したんだけど
意外とハマっちゃってね。

浮上施設にも珍しい石が
あるみたいなの。

それを、集めてきてくれないかしら。
目標があったほうが
アンタもサボりにくいでしょ？

You came at the perfect time!
I have a teeny tiny request for you.

I've started making good luck charms again,
and I'm surprisingly into it.

Apparently, there are some rare rocks at the
Floating Facility.

Could you grab some for me? You'll be less
likely to slack off if you have a goal to work
towards, right? Just a guess.
